summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Training Academy module (iteration 6) - X=pi by Carbi. All 54 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification complete - 12 original cybersecurity training programs with levels, challenges, answer submission, and AI mentor all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Academy challenges have PREDEFINED answers in training_academy.py - no dynamic answer validation
AI Mentor uses real GPT-4o via Emergent LLM key for educational hints

12 original programs with unique themes: ShadowForge (Hacking Labs), CyberSprout (Beginner Training), WarGrid (Wargames), CipherVault (Crypto), PhantomGate (Web Hacking), FlagHunter (CTF), BladePentest (Pentest Labs), StrikeHawk (Advanced CTF), WebWraith (Web Pentesting), CyberDrill (Incident Response), BreachPoint (Advanced Pentest), BlueShield (Blue Team)
Answer validation is case-insensitive with user input trimmed
Frontend properly loads programs via /api/academy/programs endpoint
Pirate flag (🏴‍☠️) modal shows all 12 programs and navigates to Academy with specific program opened
seed_data_creation: None - uses in-memory program data defined in training_academy.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Academy module fully tested. All 5 Academy API endpoints verified. 12 programs with varying levels (1-3 levels each). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_academy.py covers: programs listing (12), program detail (all 12), level detail, answer submission (correct/wrong/case-insensitive), AI mentor. Frontend tested: Academy grid, program detail, level challenges, terminal-style prompts, answer submission, success messages, SIGUIENTE DESAFIO button, AI MENTOR section, pirate flag modal navigation.

test_classes: TestAcademyPrograms (5 tests) - List programs endpoint returns 12 programs with required fields
TestAcademyProgramDetail (9 tests) - Individual program detail with levels and 404 handling
TestAcademyLevelDetail (5 tests) - Level detail with challenges structure
TestAcademySubmit (10 tests) - Answer submission with correct/wrong/case-insensitive validation
TestAllPrograms (24 tests) - Parametrized tests for all 12 programs (exists and has XP/challenges)
TestAIMentor (2 tests) - AI Mentor endpoint returns response and 404 handling

academy_module: GET /api/academy/programs - PASS (returns 12 programs with total_xp, total_challenges)
GET /api/academy/program/shadowforge - PASS (3 levels: Buffer Overflow Basics, SQL Injection Chain, Kernel Exploit)
GET /api/academy/program/cybersprout - PASS (3 levels: Fundamentos de Red, Linux Basico para Hackers, Tu Primer Exploit)
GET /api/academy/program/ciphervault - PASS (2 levels: Boveda Clasica, Boveda Moderna)
GET /api/academy/program/phantomgate - PASS (2 levels: XSS Playground, Auth Bypass)
GET /api/academy/program/blueshield - PASS (2 levels: Log Analysis, System Hardening)
POST /api/academy/submit correct {program_id:'shadowforge', level_id:'sf-1', challenge_id:'sf-1-1', user_input:'260'} - PASS (correct:true, points:10)
POST /api/academy/submit wrong {program_id:'shadowforge', level_id:'sf-1', challenge_id:'sf-1-1', user_input:'wrong'} - PASS (correct:false, hint provided)

academy_module_ui: Home screen ACADEMY card - VISIBLE (12 Programas, 2310 XP, AI Powered)
Academy grid view - All 12 program cards visible with icons, colors, taglines
Stats bar - '12 Programas', '2310 XP Total', '75 Desafios'
Program detail view - Icon, name, tagline, description, category, XP/challenges count
Level cards with difficulty badges - EASY (green), MEDIUM (yellow), HARD (red)
Level view - Progress bar, challenge counter (Desafio X de Y), points display
Challenge prompt - Terminal-style (>) with green monospace text
Challenge type badge - TERMINAL, QUIZ, CRYPTO, etc.
Answer input field - Monospace font, submit button
Correct answer result - Green checkmark, success message ('Bien hecho, operador'), points earned
SIGUIENTE DESAFIO button - Advances to next challenge
Wrong answer result - Red X, hint displayed in yellow box
AI MENTOR section - Robot icon, input field, brain button
Pirate flag emoji (🏴‍☠️) - Opens TRAINING PLATFORMS modal
Training Platforms modal - 12 programs with emojis, names, descriptions
Modal program click - Closes modal, navigates to Academy with program opened

mocked_api_note: Challenge answers are PREDEFINED in training_academy.py (in-memory). AI Mentor uses real GPT-4o via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. No database storage for user progress.
